summary: Time zone display app with 3D globe, local time, and dynamic UTC offset conversion
architectural_notes: Local time display with web layout formatting
Dynamic UTC offset time conversion based on selected offset

existing_features.title: Display the current local time below the UTC offset selector using the same date-time format as shown in the main web layout

Display a corresponding UTC offset time directly below the local time that dynamically updates when the user clicks on different UTC offset buttons, calculating the adjusted time based on the selected offset relative to the local time

Position both the local time and UTC offset time displays within the XPath element /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1], placing them directly below the UTC offset selector without modifying the existing UI layout or the 3D globe
